redis.clients.jedis.graph

Interface RedisGraphPipelineCommands

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    RedisModulePipelineCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ClusterPipeline, MultiNodePipelineBase, Pipeline, ReliableTransaction, ShardedPipeline, Transaction, TransactionBase

    public interface RedisGraphPipelineCommands
